buttons.primary: bg-[#0F4C81] text-white hover:bg-[#0c3b66] rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-semibold shadow-md transition-all hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0F4C81] border-2 border-[#0F4C81] hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-semibold transition-all
buttons.cta_urgent: bg-[#D97706] text-white hover:bg-[#b45309] rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-xl font-bold shadow-lg animate-pulse-slow

cards.service: bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all border border-stone-100 hover:border-blue-100 group

navigation.wrapper: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-stone-100

hero.headline: Sicher & Zuverlässig ans Ziel in Meisenheim
hero.subheadline: Ihr Partner für Krankenfahrten, Rollstuhltransporte und mehr. Wir bringen Sie sicher an Ihr Ziel – mit Herz und Verstand.

services.title: Krankenfahrten
services.desc: Fahrten zu Arztterminen, Kliniken und Reha.

services.title: Rollstuhlfahrten
services.desc: Spezialfahrzeuge für sicheren Transport im Rollstuhl.

services.title: Dialysefahrten
services.desc: Pünktlich und regelmäßig zur Dialyse und zurück.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all phone numbers are clickable links (tel:067532610).
Do NOT use a contact form, only display contact details prominently.
Use the 'Manrope' font for headings to give a modern but friendly feel.
Implement a 'Sticky' Call-to-Action bar on mobile with the phone number.
Use the provided image URLs strictly.
Create a separate 'Impressum' and 'Datenschutz' page or modal as per German law requirements.
The design must be 'Light' and 'Friendly' - avoid dark heavy themes.
Use 'sonner' for any notifications if needed (though likely not needed for a static site).
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
